title: Multiplicity of Truths
description: Detects and affirms contexts where multiple answers or perspectives are simultaneously valid, depending on scope, angle, or frame of reference.
indicators: Presence of multiple consistent explanations at different scales
Shift in validity depending on perspective or cultural frame
Recognition that contradiction may indicate layered truth rather than error

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
